message:
fix(supervisor): prevent restart race and fix data races

- Check if daemon state is Stopping/Stopped before restarting in
  handleDaemonFailure to prevent race where stop is ignored
- Fix ProcessState access race by holding d.mu lock
- Fix logFile access race by capturing under lock in waitForExit
